# FoveatedStreamingSession.Status.pausing

**Case**

The session is pausing its connection to a streaming endpoint.

## Declaration

```swift
case pausing
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession] briefly enters this state while it pauses the connection after you call [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/pause()], or the person returned to the home screen on visionOS.
title: FoveatedStreamingSession.Status.pausing
